{{Chess Opening Theory/Position |Tumbleweed gambit |eco=[[Chess/ECOC|C33]] |parent=[[../|King's gambit accepted]] }} == 3. Kf2?? · Tumbleweed gambit == A joke continuation. Rather than provide for their king's defence, White moves it to a more vulnerable square, where it can be attacked by ...Qh4+ or ...Bc5+. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}} '''1.e4 e5 2.f4 exf4 3. Kf2?'''
